The '''bunny''' was a diminutive [[Rabbit/Legends|rabbit]]-like lagomorph species of unknown origins.

==Characteristics==
This odd species had long ears and large mouths filled with sharp teeth, resembling the [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] species.

==History==
There was one known members of this species, [[Max (bunny)|Max]], who was usually very hyperactive. He enjoyed violence and had destructive tendencies.

As no other member of this species was ever encountered, it is unknown if his behavior reflected that of the entire species.

==Behind the scenes==
The term "bunny" and "lagomorph" have both been used to describe the character Max, an [[Easter egg (virtual)|easter egg]] from the [[Dark Forces/Jedi Knight|''Dark Forces'']] series of video games. It is unclear whether the terms refer specifically to a unique species or whether Max is simply a different version of the rabbit or [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] species.

Lagomorph is a Greek word meaning "rabbit-looking," and a term Max uses to refer to himself in [[Wikipedia:Sam & Max|''Sam & Max'']] games and comics. Lagomorpha is an order of mammals, which includes rabbits.
